data.name: 終焉之國與初始魔女
data.detailed_description:
■存在於18禁遊戲最高3D藝術殿堂的動作RPG!■


生存在一個末日即將來臨的國家，我們能做什麼...？
以高質量生動的3D遊戲方式來呈現用人們思念交織而成令人深受感動的人生物語。

有著不遜色於主機遊戲的超高品質且生動的3D模組，不僅在故事中大放異彩，在H場景中也有著令人驚嘆的表現。

角色們漂亮的身影與動作還請親自體驗遊戲看看!

■只需要滑鼠與鍵盤就可以遊玩的超簡單超爽快動作RPG!■


是專為使用滑鼠與鍵盤的PC玩家設計的作品
這是一款可以在遊戲中收集各種魔法，並打敗強大敵人的爽快動作遊戲。

遊戲內可以選擇難易度。也有等級提升的系統或興奮劑等道具，所以就算是不擅長動作游戲或3D游戲的人也能順利通關喔。

■H場景■


H的部分有很多是強姦與凌辱場景。所以為了與家人同住等因素不方便觀看的玩家，特別設計了跳過H場景的功能。

使用了特殊的著色器設計和相機切割理論。
讓3D不擅長的插畫風格，也能擁有超高的完成質量。

所以3D不擅長的插圖式表情表現，也會非常的自然。

此外，玩家還可以很好的享受到競技場、人物觀賞模式和舞蹈場景等遊戲副元素。

雖然開放H的部分是有條件的，但此設計是為了讓玩家不會去錯過任何一個場景而設置的。
此外，當游戲破關後，就可以打開所有的回憶場景。

■遊戲推薦規格■


在遊戲中可以選擇負荷較少的輕量版

■対応OS
Windows 10/11　64bit 日本語版

■DirectX
DirectX 11 或 DirectX 12 對應的顯卡

■記憶體
推薦:8 GB 以上

■操作
滑鼠與鍵盤

*控制器只支持XInput（一些額外事件只支持滑鼠）。

data.short_description: 生存在一個末日即將來臨的國家，我們能做什麼...？ 操作簡單的超爽快3D動作18禁RPG! 通過特殊的陰影和切割技術表現出來的插圖式3D視覺效果在主機遊戲中也是首屈一指!
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN10/WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN10/WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: The Kingdom of the End＆The Witch of the Beginning
data.detailed_description:
■An action RPG in the top palace of 3D art of prohibited games for users under 18!■


If we survive in a country facing doomsday, is there anything we can do...?
The vivid, high-quality 3D game presents a touching life perception woven with people's yearning.

With a vivid and superb-quality 3D module that is as favourable as other single-player games, the game boasts terrific stories and outstanding H-scenes performances.

Please start the game in person and look at the beautiful figures and actions of the characters!

■An easy and joyful action RPG can be operated only with a mouse and keyboard!■


It is a game designed for PC players using a mouse and keyboard.
It is an enjoyable action game in which you can collect various magic and defeat powerful enemies.

You can choose the difficulty levels of the game. In the game, there are props, including a level-up system and stimulants, so even people who are not good at action games or 3D games can also finish the game successfully.

■H scenes■


This section has many rape and abuse scenes, so the skipping function is designed for players who have started a family.

Unique shader design and camera segmentation theory are used.
It enables the illustration style not well equipped in 3D fields to have sound finishing quality.

Therefore, the expression and performance with the illustration style not well equipped in 3D fields can also be presented freely.

In addition, players can enjoy accessory elements of the game, such as the arena, the character's spectator mode and dance scenes.

Although using H scenes is conditional, the design allows players to experience every scene.
Moreover, the whole memory scene can be seen when you overcome all barriers in the game.

■Recommended specifications of the game■


You can choose a lightweight version with less load in the game.

■Proper OS
Windows 10/11　64bit Japanese version

■DirectX
Corresponding GPU of DirectX 11 or DirectX 12

■Memory
Recommended: over 8 GB

■Operation
Mouse and keyboard

*XInput controllers only (mouse only in some additional events).

data.short_description: If we survive in a country facing doomsday, is there anything we can do...? A 3D-action RPG with an easy and joyful operation! The illustrative 3D visual effect is presented through particular shading and segmentation technologies, leading among single-player games.
data.supported_languages:
Japanese*, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WIN10/WIN11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 512 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WIN10/WIN11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
